promotionDelta: Verify BasicDefaults and RecommendedMergora controls, including complete disabled-output evidence, against the generated implementation matrix.
Generate and verify source, package, registry, documentation, and public subpath outputs.
Bind strict type, unit, SSR, hydration, schema, browser, axe, announcement, and preference results to the candidate digest.
Complete required manual keyboard, touch, speech, switch, forced-colors, NVDA/Firefox, and VoiceOver/Safari sessions.
Pass packed Next.js and Vite package/source consumers plus package/source behavioral parity.
Add Semantic Sync clean, customized, conflict, rollback, removal, and dependency fixtures.
Review long localization, RTL, 200 percent text, 400 percent zoom, 320 CSS pixels, dark, enhanced contrast, and reduced motion.
Publish an approved Quality Passport and dogfood the generated artifact on the public site.
